title: What rising memory chip prices could mean for Apple's iPhones
summary: US stocks (^GSPC, ^DJI, ^IXIC) managed to close Wednesday's session higher despite a new sell-off appearing across the semiconductor industry. Baird tech strategist Ted Mortonson explains what rising memory chip costs could mean for tech consumers and companies like iPhone maker Apple (AAPL).

title: Does the PayPal takeover deal make any sense?
summary: In today's Opening Bid panel, our guests tackle the Question of the Day: Is PayPal (PYPL) worth the price? Following reports of a potential offer to acquire the struggling payments company, the panel examines whether the stock is an attractive buy. AllSource Investment Management Founder and Managing Partner Patrick Kennedy, HSBC Strategist Duncan Toms, and Yahoo Finance Senior Business Reporter Brooke DiPalma break down the implications of the reported interest and what it could mean for investors.

title: The US won't adopt Chinese memory — but it will win the AI race: Strategist
summary: Bokeh Capital Partners founder and chief investment officer, Kimberly Forrest, shares her take on memory chip stocks and the US vs. China.

title: Dow Jones Futures: Apple, Google Mask Dell, Sandisk, Micron Sell-Off; J.B. Hunt Jumps Late
summary: Dell, Sandisk and Micron led an AI sell-off, masked by megacaps such as Apple. SpaceX undercut its IPO price. Taiwan Semi, GE Aerospace earnings are due.

title: Warren Buffett Says Alphabet (GOOGL) Can Beat 95% of Wall Street Stock Picks
summary: Warren Buffett says Alphabet will beat 95% of Wall Street picks as Berkshire's stake tops $31 billion. GOOGL stock surges.

title: Good News on the Memory Shortage Is Bad News for Chip Stocks
summary: ASML says its high-end machines are helping investors make memory more quickly than expected. In the short term, that could weigh on memory prices.

title: Apple Stock Closes at a New High. Earnings Could Change Everything.
summary: Apple shares rose 4% to $327.50, a new all-time closing high.  The Cyberspace Administration of China on Wednesday included Apple’s generative artificial intelligence on a list of newly approved providers.  Evercore ISI analyst Amit Daryanani wrote that the update clears the biggest regulatory hurdle for Apple Intelligence—the company’s AI software—in the world’s largest smartphone market.

title: Megacap Tech Lifts U.S. Stocks
summary: U.S. stocks edged higher Wednesday as gains in megacap technology names offset weakness in chip stocks.  PayPal  surged on reports of a takeover offer and another round of strong bank earnings kept Wall Street in an upbeat mood.  The S&P 500 added 28.81 points, or 0.38%, to 7572.40, while the Nasdaq Composite gained 162.22 points, or 0.62%, to 26269.23.

title: Is This Why Memory Stocks Are Plunging?
summary: Memory stocks plunged on Wednesday along with shares of other hardware providers for AI data centers.

title: Apple Could Buy an AI Chip Company. Its Hot Stock Just Set a Fresh Record High
summary: Apple shares climbed to a fresh record Wednesday, in the wake of reports the iPhone maker is considering buying an AI chip company to fuel its AI ambitions.
